promoted_facts.fact: Force majeure provision allows franchisor to terminate after 180 days of continued delay, on 30 days notice
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not in reader report (found in Depth Pass 2 from FA Article 20)

promoted_facts.fact: Franchise Agreement cross-default: failure to cure under any agreement between franchisee and franchisor (including other FAs, ADA, lease, promissory note) is a non-curable default
Franchisee's exclusive remedy for unreasonable withholding of consent is specific performance or declaratory judgment — no money damages
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not in reader report (found in Depth Pass 2 from FA Section 21.03)

promoted_facts.fact: Franchisee must irrevocably license to franchisor all IP, products, programs, advertising materials developed for the business
Three states (IL, MD, ND) have imposed fee deferral requirements due to franchisor's financial condition
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not in original reader report (found in Retry R2 state addenda)

promoted_facts.fact: Prior period adjustment in FY2023 of +$4,000 (nature not specified)
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not in reader report (found in Depth Pass 1 from 2023 equity statement)

promoted_facts.fact: Las Vegas franchise has 5% royalty rate on prior month's generated revenue (vs. standard 5% of Gross Revenues)
Social media and website prohibition: franchisee cannot maintain own online presence without revocable written approval
2023 cash flow statement shows $4,000 financing activity classified as prior period adjustment
Wisconsin Fair Dealership Act requires 90-day notice for termination and 60-day cure period
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not in original reader report (found in Retry R2 state addenda)
